title: Samantha Day The Great British Menu Of Petty Complaints
description: Leicester Comedy Festival's 2025 Award Winner brings her new comedy show to Brighton. A very funny show which treats Britain's most trivial problems with the seriousness that they deserve. It's always Whine O'Clock in Britain. Other people! Driving too slowly, making grammatical errors and joking about the wrong things. Britain has never been so divided - and this show will certainly make it worse! “Just brilliant” Arthur Smith "A highly engaging performer" Chortle Funny Women Stage Award - Finalist (2025) British Comedy Guide Pro Award - Finalist (2025) Read a review of the show here: https://one4review.co.uk/2025/08/samantha-day-the-great-british-menu-of-petty-complaints-4/
